title: Certified Innovation Professional – Innovation Champion
tagline: The entry-level certification to begin a structured innovation journey.
description: The Innovation Champion certification is designed for professionals beginning their innovation journey. Participants get acquainted with business innovation and learn the key tools and techniques of innovation management to take their first step toward becoming innovation practitioners.

title: Certified Innovation Professional – Level 1
tagline: The globally recognised foundation certification for business innovators.
description: The Innovation Associate Level 1 is the globally recognised entry-level professional certification for business innovation. It teaches the use of idea generation tools and how to apply them to create breakthrough ideas. Accredited under ISO/IEC 17024.

title: Certified Innovation Professional – Level 2
tagline: Apply Level 1 learnings to a real-world innovation challenge.
description: The Innovation Master Level 2 challenges candidates to apply Associate-level knowledge to a real-world innovation problem. Participants build a case study on generating new growth ideas for their organisation, documented and reviewed by GIMI experts.

title: CIP Masterclass
tagline: 7-week virtual cohort programme combining theory, practice, and ISO 56000 standards.
description: The CIP Masterclass is the advanced training programme for professionals who want to master the science of innovation management. Fully aligned with ISO 56002, 56003, and 56004, it is the fastest path to CIP certification for working professionals.

title: Certified Chief Innovation Officer – Level 3
tagline: The end-to-end management of organisational innovation.
description: The Innovation Manager Level 3 certification is designed for managers taking their first step toward becoming a Certified Chief Innovation Officer. Participants gain an advanced understanding of business innovation strategy, capacity, and discipline.

title: Certified Chief Innovation Officer – Level 4
tagline: Validate ability to build and manage innovation ecosystems.
description: The Innovation Leader Level 4 certification is designed for senior professionals ready to apply Manager Level 3 learnings to real organisational challenges. Participants submit a documented experience on an Innovation Ecosystem or Portfolio Management initiative.

title: CCIO Masterclass
tagline: The premier executive designation for innovation leaders.
description: The CCIO Masterclass is a 7-week virtual masterclass led by globally recognised innovation experts. It certifies that a professional has the broad range of knowledge required to function as a successful manager and leader of enterprise-wide innovation programmes.

title: Certified GIMI Impact: Students
tagline: For high school students to be more innovative and compassionate.
description: The GIMI Impact certification empowers high school students to apply creativity and structured problem-solving to address complex challenges around the world.

title: Certified GIMI Impact: Teachers
tagline: For teachers to instil innovation mindset in students.
description: GIMI Impact for Teachers empowers high school teachers to teach students to be more innovative, compassionate, and to solve complex problems.

title: Certified GIMI Trainer
tagline: For certified GIMI individuals who want to train others.
description: The Certified GIMI Trainer certification develops mastery in delivering GIMI frameworks and tools to train others on GIMI methodologies inside or outside the organisation.

title: Innovation Primer
tagline: Transform from passive observer of change into proactive driver of value.
description: The Innovation Primer is a six-module self-paced course for individuals who want to build skills to connect knowledge, research, and diverse perspectives to create value for clients, organisations, and career.

title: Problem Solving Certified Catalyst
tagline: Structured five-step ideation: Setup, Diverge, Connect, Converge, Emerge.
description: Designed for individuals from all backgrounds who want to develop a structured approach to creative problem-solving through a purpose-driven, five-step ideation process.

title: Certified Design Thinking: Level 1
tagline: Master human-centered design through Immerse, Invent, Implement.
description: Build a strong foundation in Design Thinking through its three stages: Immerse (user insights and empathy), Invent (problem statements and solutions), and Implement (prototyping, testing, iterating).

title: Certified Design Thinking: Level 2
tagline: Apply Design Thinking methods to a real organisational challenge.
description: Document your process, insights, and outcomes in a white paper showing how you used the Immerse, Invent, and Implement stages.

title: Certified Design Thinking Trainer
tagline: Train others in the Immerse, Invent, Implement methodology.
description: Through a 3-session online masterclass, participants master facilitation of the Immerse, Invent, and Implement stages.

title: Certified AI Agent Practitioner
tagline: Operationalise AI in your organisation through Innovation 5.0.
description: A hands-on, executive-ready workshop where participants identify a real business need, design an AI-powered solution, and build a functional agent mock-up.

title: Certified GIMI Auditor
tagline: Conduct audits of innovation management systems aligned with ISO 56001.
description: Gain an in-depth understanding of GIMI and ISO 56001 standards and practical tools to assess the innovation maturity of different organisations.

title: Certified ISO Innovation Management Expert
tagline: Establish, implement, and improve Innovation Management Systems aligned with ISO 56000.
description: A comprehensive professional programme to design and systematise innovation management in full alignment with the ISO 56000 family, delivered by ISO committee members.

title: Certified Technology Catalyst
tagline: Leverage 130+ breakthrough technologies for future-ready strategies.
description: Designed for individuals who want to thrive in a world where innovation is essential. Leverage breakthrough technologies to identify emerging trends and craft strategies.

title: Certified Longevity Catalyst
tagline: Lead the shift from an ageing society to a longevity society.
description: Drawing on the 2025 GIMI Think Tank Longevity Series, participants explore brain health, longevity society economics, breakthrough innovations, and new mindsets that redefine ageing.

title: Certified Foresight Professional: Level 1
tagline: Question current assumptions; strengthen analytical and intuitive mindsets.
description: Gain essential knowledge of future foresight, including fundamentals and literacy, key premises and principles, and a comprehensive immersion into the main schools of thought and practice.

title: Certified Foresight Leader: Level 2
tagline: Master the end-to-end foresight process with the S4 Futures framework.
description: Learn the S4 Futures framework (Scoping, Scanning, Scenarios, Strategy) and explore multiple foresight methodologies and tools to manage foresight projects.

title: Certified Foresight Officer: Level 3
tagline: Apply Levels 1 and 2 knowledge to lead a Foresight Project.
description: Demonstrate the capacity to lead a Foresight Project, integrating methodological phases and the appropriate tools.

title: Certified Trainer in Future Foresight Level 1
tagline: Train others on Future Foresight Level 1.
description: Develop the ability to prepare candidates inside or outside the organisation to obtain the FF Certification Level 1.

title: Certified Trainer in Future Foresight Level 2
tagline: Train others on Future Foresight Level 2.
description: Develop the ability to prepare candidates inside or outside the organisation to obtain the FF Certification Level 2.

title: Certified Leader for the Future
tagline: Build collaborative leadership skills to drive exponential results.
description: Develop strong leadership values that support your vision and learn to use the Powers of AND to drive effective results and navigate ambiguity and volatility.

title: Certified Innovation Leader
tagline: Transform innovation from chaotic event into repeatable leadership competency.
description: A micro-course using the SCD Framework (Strategy, Capacity, Discipline) to give leaders the mental models and tactical tools to drive measurable change.

title: Management Consulting Certified Analyst: Level 1
tagline: The fundamentals of management consulting.
description: Develop analytical techniques, problem-solving methodologies, and foundational knowledge to think and act like a consultant.

title: Management Consulting Certified Consultant: Level 2
tagline: Apply Level 1 learnings to real-world consulting projects.
description: Work on a team project sponsored by a senior-level sponsor within 12 months of earning Level 1. Learn Situation-Complication-Question analysis and project presentation.

title: Management Consulting Certified Manager: Level 3
tagline: Strategy Formulation, Execution Planning, and REALIZE methodology.
description: Bridge the gap between strategy formulation and execution with precision and impact.

title: Management Consulting Certified Leader: Level 4
tagline: Shape the future of consulting through visionary leadership.
description: Build on Level 3 by working on a team project sponsored by a senior-level sponsor within 12 months of earning Level 3, focusing on visionary leadership and advanced strategy execution.

title: IMBOK Level 1 Guide
tagline: The Innovation Management Body of Knowledge, Level 1.
description: The IMBOK Level 1 extends the existing knowledge of business professionals around Innovation Strategy, Capacity, and Discipline at the foundation level.

title: IMBOK Level 3 Guide
tagline: The Innovation Management Body of Knowledge, Level 3.
description: The IMBOK Level 3 extends the existing knowledge around innovation management for chief innovation officers and managers.

title: Future Foresight Body of Knowledge – Level 1
tagline: The reference text for the foresight professional pathway.
description: The reference text for foresight professional certification at Level 1.

title: Future Foresight Body of Knowledge – Level 2
tagline: The reference text for the foresight leader pathway.
description: The reference text for foresight professional certification at Level 2.

title: ISO Book – ISO 56000 Series
tagline: Reference compilation of the ISO 56000 series.
description: A consolidated reference covering the ISO 56000 family of standards: Fundamentals, Systems Guidance, Innovation Partnership, Assessment, and IP Management.

title: Game Changers
tagline: How game-changing business concepts adapt to a fast-changing economic world.
description: Shows how game-changing business concepts aren\

title: Connectivate!
tagline: Stories of fifty innovative companies whose breakthroughs are changing the world.
description: A collection of stories of more than fifty innovative companies whose breakthroughs are changing the world.

title: Healthovate!
tagline: Innovation breakthroughs changing the health and wellness industry.
description: Compiles vignettes from innovative companies whose breakthroughs are changing the health and wellness industry.

title: Greenovate!
tagline: Green innovation breakthroughs changing sustainable growth.
description: Stories from innovative companies whose green innovation breakthroughs are changing sustainable growth alternatives.

title: Squiggly Lines
tagline: Innovation is team sport: managing stakeholders through the journey.
description: Squiggly Lines provides the reader with guidelines on how to manage various stakeholders throughout the journey of innovation.

title: GIMI iDeX – Ideation Techniques for Idea Excellence
tagline: The practitioner\
description: A practitioner reference for ideation techniques used to generate, develop, and refine ideas at scale.

title: Technovate (Book + App)
tagline: Book plus companion app for technology-driven innovation.
description: Book and companion application that helps practitioners apply technology-driven innovation methods.

title: International Journal of Innovation Science
tagline: Peer-reviewed articles on innovation science and practice.
description: A peer-reviewed journal compiled from a range of innovation experts on the developments and applications of innovation science.

title: IPA Individual
tagline: Understand your innovation mindset and your growth path.
description: The Innovation Potential Assessment Individual reveals an individual\

title: Innovation Mindset Index
tagline: Online self-assessment of innovation mindset.
description: An online assessment that identifies an individual\

title: GIMI Innovation Awards – Individual Ticket
tagline: Attend the annual GIMI Innovation Awards ceremony.
description: Individual attendance ticket for the annual GIMI Innovation Awards ceremony.

title: IPA Corporate
tagline: Map your team\
description: Team-level Innovation Potential Assessment. Tiered pricing by company or business unit size.

title: OIA Self-Assessment
tagline: Instant visibility into your innovation maturity with an automated roadmap.
description: Web-based digital tool for organisations to independently assess current and desired innovation maturity across Strategy, Capacity, Discipline, and Performance.

title: Full Organizational Innovation Assessment (Full OIA)
tagline: Expert-led audit producing a Company Certificate at Level 1–4.
description: Comprehensive professional evaluation conducted by GIMI auditors. The audit produces a formal Company Certificate at Level 1, 2, 3, or 4, with the certification fee determined by the outcome level.

title: AKAIO – AI-Powered Innovation Platform
tagline: Explore hidden trends, envision future scenarios, match with partners.
description: A unique AI-powered Innovation Ecosystem Platform with intelligent partner matchmaking and AI-generated scenario exploration.

title: Eureka – Online Subscription
tagline: Idea management and innovation portfolio software.
description: Eureka provides a collaborative environment to manage innovation portfolios, run lean experiments, iterate ideas rapidly, and develop artefacts at scale.

title: Service Innovation Tool
tagline: Diagnose service innovation gaps.
description: A tool for organisations to diagnose service innovation gaps and design improvements across the service portfolio.

title: QuickGrowth
tagline: Software-enabled strategic planning platform for SMEs.
description: QuickGrowth is a software-enabled strategic planning programme that helps SME owners assess operations, identify improvement opportunities, and develop actionable plans for immediate results.

title: Innovation Academy
tagline: Transform your organisation into a self-sustaining learning hub.
description: A strategic capability-building engine that transforms an organisation into a Learning Hub for innovation, standardising the language and building internal mentors.

title: GIMI Innovation Coaching
tagline: Personalised coaching with innovation experts.
description: A personalised coaching experience to boost individual and company innovation approaches. Available per session, per month, or per year.

title: GIMI Innovation Awards – Organization
tagline: International recognition for groundbreaking innovation initiatives.
description: An international recognition programme to identify and celebrate groundbreaking innovation initiatives. 10 award categories across public, private, and social sectors.

title: Innovation Keynote Speech
tagline: Inspire leadership alignment and spark innovation mindset.
description: A keynote engagement designed to generate executive alignment and organisational excitement around innovation, with current trends, technologies, and real case studies.

title: Student Membership
tagline: Annual access for students.
description: Annual membership for students providing access to GIMI community, learning resources, and Think Tank sessions.

title: Professional Membership
tagline: Annual access for professionals.
description: Professional Membership provides individuals access to active leadership and influence, lifelong learning, career opportunities, and a global innovation community.

title: Corporate Membership – Gold
tagline: Corporate access at the Gold tier.
description: Corporate membership at the Gold tier including community access, learning resources, and discounted assessments and engagements.

title: Corporate Membership – Silver
tagline: Corporate access at the Silver tier.
description: Corporate membership at the Silver tier including community access and learning resources.

title: Corporate Membership – Platinum
tagline: Corporate access at the Platinum tier.
description: Corporate membership at the Platinum tier including premium community access, learning resources, and priority access to GIMI engagements.

title: Organizational Membership – Academia
tagline: For universities and academic institutions.
description: Organisational membership for universities and academic institutions, supporting innovation research, student programmes, and the GIMI community.

title: GIMI Think Tank
tagline: Monthly access to global innovation experts and 18,000+ innovators.
description: Open access to the monthly GIMI Think Tank Webinar, discussion sessions with industry leading experts, and networking with C-level executives.
